title: あの感動は、ここにある

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One fine afternoon, I stop by an outdoor cafe to take a breather.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
T-Traineeer?! No way, no way! What're the impossible odds of
running into you here?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: This! Is! GREAT! You know what it means? It's going to be an awesome day!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But we should make it even more awesome! Stand in line with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not sure what's happening, I'm led to a huge line of people standing
in front of a trendy crepe shop.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! Look at this! The line's huge! It's always so long! It makes
me... so...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Happyyyyy! Good for you, crepe duuude!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yep! This crepe shop's been my top fav since I entered Tracen
Academy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, but it used to be just a little cart that came to the park.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Even then though, it was sooooo good!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's the climax on my Super Charged Weekend Fun List!
Aaalways has been!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Then the shop started appearing in magazines and on TV a lot, and
before I knew it, it became this super spectacular place!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Just look... at this huge line...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! Crepe dude! Great for yooou! Congraaats!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she's crying tears of joy, I try to sooth Ticket as we make our
way down the impressively long line and to the counter.

text_block_list.name: Part-timer
text_block_list.text:
We're sorry, but the next pair of customers will be the last of the day.
Now... may I take your orders?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: YES!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Extra double cream drizzle with crunchy mini bits! And make that two!
Thanks so muuuch!

text_block_list.name: Crepe Maker
text_block_list.text: Sure thing...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket's waited so long to see the owner, but he keeps his
head down in apathetic silence, failing to notice her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wondering why he's behaving like that, we take our crepes away.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Mhm. It was good, huh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But? What's wrong? It tasted fine—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? That's not right.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... It's weird! Something's weird! How could the crepes here ever
be just "fine"?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: CREPE DUUUDE!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey, crepe dude! What exactly could possibly be wrong!?!

text_block_list.name: Crepe Maker
text_block_list.text: Whoa... Huh? Oh, it's you, Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Crepe Maker
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I'm busy. Can we talk later—

text_block_list.name: Crepe Maker
text_block_list.text: Uh? Wh-what's the problem?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Crepe dude! The flavor's off! Did you change something about your
crepes?

text_block_list.name: Crepe Maker
text_block_list.text:
Wha! Something's off? That's crazy. The recipe, the
ingredients—they're all the same as before.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But it's different! Something's different!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I still remember the first time I ate one from your cart in that little
park!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It was like wow, wow, wow! SO tasty! I couldn't stand how good it was!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Nom, nom, nom! I gobbled it up and asked for more! Five times!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I was about to burst, so I ran a lap. But when I got back, you were
already closing up shop...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: My stomach grrrowled really loud, and I asked for one last crepe! And you made me the MOST delicious one ever!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'll never forget that taste! How could I? How, crepe duuude?!

text_block_list.name: Crepe Maker
text_block_list.text: That's... right. I feel the same way, Ticket... I'll never forget that day.

text_block_list.name: Crepe Maker
text_block_list.text: ...Wait right there, would ya?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few minutes pass, and the owner comes back with a freshly made
crepe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: All that's left is to see how it tastes...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: SOOO GOOOOOD! The best! It's the greatest!

text_block_list.name: Crepe Maker
text_block_list.text: I'm really glad. I went full power, just like that day.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Full power?!

text_block_list.name: Crepe Maker
text_block_list.text:
You know, I did notice I wasn't looking customers in the eye anymore.
Told myself it's 'cause I'm just too busy. But really? It's 'cause my heart
wasn't in it.

text_block_list.name: Crepe Maker
text_block_list.text:
But I remember the way it felt that day thanks to you... Making a
crepe with my entire being so it could be enjoyed entirely by
someone. That was true happiness.

text_block_list.name: Crepe Maker
text_block_list.text:
There's plenty to try before throwin' in the towel. I could get more
help, take more days off... It's time to roll up my sleeves and start
fresh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Uuug! Oh, crepe duuude!
choice_data_list:
You inspired him with everything you have,
huh?

You inspired him with everything you have,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yep! I'm so glad it worked... Really glad!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer... Let's eat here again sometime!
